name: Playground - Multi-Turn Skill Switch
description: Validates that the Playground agent correctly transitions when the active skill in session state changes between conversation turns.

parts.text: Hello, what skill are you currently embodying?
I am currently embodying the code-review skill. I can review code changes for quality, security, and adherence to team coding standards. How can I help?
I have switched to the deploy-to-k8s skill. I can now help you with Kubernetes deployment workflows, including creating manifests, applying configurations, and troubleshooting deployments.

state.active_skill_spec:
---
name: deploy-to-k8s
description: Guides Kubernetes deployment workflows including manifest creation and troubleshooting.
---

# Deploy to K8s Instructions

1. Analyze the application requirements
2. Generate appropriate Kubernetes manifests
3. Guide the user through kubectl apply
4. Help troubleshoot deployment issues
